'''Jon Foster''' is an artist who illustrated the covers of numerous ''[[Star Wars]]'' novels, [[Star Wars comic books|comics]], and sourcebooks. His painting of the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]] character [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] for the cover of the [[Star Wars (1998) 33|thirty-third issue]] of [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse's]] ongoing [[Star Wars: Republic|''Star Wars'' series]], released in [[2001]], impressed [[George Lucas]] so much that he decided to [[Aayla Secura|include her]] in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|aaylasecura|Secura, Aayla}}</ref>

{{Bio-stub}}
